## Feature Description
**A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.**

## Problem Statement
**What problem does this feature solve? What is the motivation?**

## Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.**

## Alternative Solutions
**Have you considered any alternative approaches?**

## Trading System Integration
**How does this feature integrate with the existing trading platform?**
- [ ] Real-time data processing
- [ ] Elliott Wave analysis
- [ ] ML/AI components
- [ ] Risk management
- [ ] Broker connectivity
- [ ] User interface
- [ ] API endpoints
- [ ] Compliance/regulatory

## Technical Considerations
**Are there any technical constraints or requirements?**
- Performance requirements:
- Security considerations:
- Scalability needs:
- Integration points:

## Success Criteria
**How will we know this feature is successful?**
- [ ] Acceptance criteria 1
- [ ] Acceptance criteria 2
- [ ] Acceptance criteria 3

## Priority
**How important is this feature?**
- [ ] Critical: Core functionality, high impact
- [ ] High: Important enhancement
- [ ] Medium: Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low: Future consideration

## Implementation Estimate
**Rough estimate of implementation complexity:**
- [ ] Small: < 1 week
- [ ] Medium: 1-2 weeks
- [ ] Large: 2-4 weeks
- [ ] Epic: > 4 weeks

## Dependencies
**Does this feature depend on other work?**
- Related issues:
- External dependencies:
- API changes required:

## Additional Context
**Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.**
